item.title: Building a Serious Revolving Tailstock Chuck
item.description: A lathe this big needs a custom revolving tailstock chuck. With no off‑the‑shelf option, we start by unpacking the 4‑jaw chuck to see if it fits the build.

media:content.media:title: Building a Serious Revolving Tailstock Chuck
media:content.media:description: A lathe this big needs a custom revolving tailstock chuck. With no off‑the‑shelf option, we start by unpacking the 4‑jaw chuck to see if it fits the build.

item.title: Making a Replacement Gear Selector Fork for the Lathe
item.description: When Kurtis broke the lathe’s gear selector fork, the solution was clear — machine a brand‑new one from scratch.

media:content.media:title: Making a Replacement Gear Selector Fork for the Lathe
media:content.media:description: When Kurtis broke the lathe’s gear selector fork, the solution was clear — machine a brand‑new one from scratch.

item.title: This 8‑Tonne Forklift Has Worn‑Out Bushings
item.description: Heavy loads take their toll. This forklift’s worn‑out bushings demand machining and replacement to restore strength and reliability.

media:content.media:title: This 8‑Tonne Forklift Has Worn‑Out Bushings
media:content.media:description: Heavy loads take their toll. This forklift’s worn‑out bushings demand machining and replacement to restore strength and reliability.

item.title: Vertex Super Indexing Head in Action!
item.description: Assembly, testing, and precision machining — the Vertex Super Indexing Head goes to work, delivering accurate dividing and rotation on the milling machine.

media:content.media:title: Vertex Super Indexing Head in Action!
media:content.media:description: Assembly, testing, and precision machining — the Vertex Super Indexing Head goes to work, delivering accurate dividing and rotation on the milling machine.

item.title: Saving the CAT 24M Accumulator — Machining the Stubborn Cap
item.description: This cap didn’t want to come out smoothly, but careful machining and patience finally broke through the last thin layer. One tough step closer to saving the CAT 24M accumulator.

media:content.media:title: Saving the CAT 24M Accumulator — Machining the Stubborn Cap
media:content.media:description: This cap didn’t want to come out smoothly, but careful machining and patience finally broke through the last thin layer. One tough step closer to saving the CAT 24M accumulator.

item.title: This Cat 631 Is Getting the Brand‑New‑Parts Treatment!
item.description: The Cat 631 gets a major overhaul with brand‑new parts. Watch the transformation as worn components are replaced to restore full strength.

media:content.media:title: This Cat 631 Is Getting the Brand‑New‑Parts Treatment!
media:content.media:description: The Cat 631 gets a major overhaul with brand‑new parts. Watch the transformation as worn components are replaced to restore full strength.

item.title: Tackling a CAT 657 Scraper Cylinder Rod — Properly Munted!
item.description: A CAT 657 scraper cylinder rod arrives badly damaged. This clip shows the challenge of machining and repairing a component that’s truly “munted.”

media:content.media:title: Tackling a CAT 657 Scraper Cylinder Rod — Properly Munted!
media:content.media:description: A CAT 657 scraper cylinder rod arrives badly damaged. This clip shows the challenge of machining and repairing a component that’s truly “munted.”

item.title: Machined from Scratch — Vintage Quill Feed Attachment Revival
item.description: Another part machined to spec, bringing a vintage quill feed attachment back to life. Precision machining keeps history running strong.

media:content.media:title: Machined from Scratch — Vintage Quill Feed Attachment Revival
media:content.media:description: Another part machined to spec, bringing a vintage quill feed attachment back to life. Precision machining keeps history running strong.

item.title: This CAT 140M Needs Some Urgent Care!
item.description: The CAT 140M grader arrives in rough shape. This video captures the urgent repairs needed to bring it back to reliable service.

media:content.media:title: This CAT 140M Needs Some Urgent Care!
media:content.media:description: The CAT 140M grader arrives in rough shape. This video captures the urgent repairs needed to bring it back to reliable service.

item.title: Unboxing & Testing Our New Metal Spray System!
item.description: A brand‑new metal spray system hits the workshop. Watch the unboxing, setup, and first test runs as we put it through its paces.

media:content.media:title: Unboxing & Testing Our New Metal Spray System!
media:content.media:description: A brand‑new metal spray system hits the workshop. Watch the unboxing, setup, and first test runs as we put it through its paces.

item.title: Precision Repairs in Action! | Welding the Franna Diesel Tank
item.description: Fresh sheet metal, clean welds, and no more leaks — this clip shows precision repairs sealing up the Franna diesel tank for good.

media:content.media:title: Precision Repairs in Action! | Welding the Franna Diesel Tank
media:content.media:description: Fresh sheet metal, clean welds, and no more leaks — this clip shows precision repairs sealing up the Franna diesel tank for good.

item.title: Massive Repair! — Can We Fix This Hydraulic Cylinder?
item.description: A hydraulic cylinder in rough shape demands a major repair. This video captures the process, the challenges, and the question of whether it can be saved.

media:content.media:title: Massive Repair! — Can We Fix This Hydraulic Cylinder?
media:content.media:description: A hydraulic cylinder in rough shape demands a major repair. This video captures the process, the challenges, and the question of whether it can be saved.

item.title: It Was Cracked Badly! | Repairing a Telescopic Cylinder
item.description: A telescopic cylinder arrives with severe cracks — but careful machining and welding aim to bring it back to life.

media:content.media:title: It Was Cracked Badly! | Repairing a Telescopic Cylinder
media:content.media:description: A telescopic cylinder arrives with severe cracks — but careful machining and welding aim to bring it back to life.

item.title: Can We Bring This Worn‑Out Mining Component Back to Service?
item.description: A massive mining dump truck track rod faces a full strip‑down and overhaul. This video shows the challenge of restoring a worn‑out component to working condition.

media:content.media:title: Can We Bring This Worn‑Out Mining Component Back to Service?
media:content.media:description: A massive mining dump truck track rod faces a full strip‑down and overhaul. This video shows the challenge of restoring a worn‑out component to working condition.
